subject: [PATCH v4 10/21] swap: move swap cache to virtual swap descriptor

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified the need to update swap_cache_lock() and related functions to take a virtual swap descriptor as an argument, allowing for range-partitioning of the swap cache.

reviews.author: Zi Yan
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the impact of this change on existing code and suggested that a more incremental approach might be necessary.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch moves the swap cache to a virtual swap descriptor, effectively range-partitioning it by virtual swap clusters and eliminating lock contention.
